title: lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. pedunculatus
intro: Lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. pedunculatus is a species of plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the Taiwan lasiandthus or Taiwan teabush. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus pedunculatus subsp. pedunculatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
